name: Indoor Golf Club: The Bays on Coleman Golf Simulators
address: 736 Coleman Blvd Suite 110, Mt Pleasant, SC 29464
about: The Bays on Coleman is a members-only indoor golf simulator facility equipped with top-of-the-line Trackman technology. Located in Mount Pleasant, South Carolina, it features 2,500 square feet of space with three social bays and one fully enclosed privacy bay. The facility offers a clubhouse-grade experience with amenities such as a member lounge, soundproof phone booth, locker area, and a self-serve wet bar for BYOB. Access is primarily through membership tiers, including Full, Limited, and Corporate options, with Full Members enjoying 24/7 access. The venue is designed for both social play and private practice, providing a versatile environment for golf enthusiasts to enjoy the game year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade Trackman simulators used by PGA pros
Social and private bay options for different group sizes and preferences
24/7 facility access for Full Members with flexible booking
Honor bar and BYOB policy for a relaxed clubhouse experience
Cross-bay play and tournament-style challenges for competitive fun

food_and_drink.notes: Limited snacks available for purchase; members can bring their own food.
BYOB allowed with a self-serve wet bar; no staffed bar on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line radar-based technology used by PGA pros for training

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility has a self-serve wet bar for BYOB, and members can bring their own food. Limited snacks and non-alcoholic beverages are also available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on simulator usage and booking, but typical sessions allow for flexible play based on member availability.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Bays is a members-only venue focused on adult golfers and does not advertise itself as kid-friendly.
